positive: A geometric, stylized representation of a celestial river, flowing through a grove of abstract, glowing bioluminescent flora. The main composition features interlocking, clean silhouettes of cosmic pathways and stylized leaves, rendered with high contrast black ink on a muted cream background. Use Art Nouveau principles mixed with minimalist scientific illustration. Focus on symmetry and radial balance. The lighting should suggest an ethereal, midnight glow, highlighting the strong outlines and negative space. Limited color palette: deep sapphire blue, mint green, and pure black outlines. Seamless, repeat-friendly pattern suitable for apparel printing.
